articles.title: Best Cashback Credit Cards in the UK: What You Actually Earn
articles.metaTitle: Best Cashback Credit Cards UK: What You Actually Earn
articles.metaDescription: The real cashback rates on UK credit cards this year, the caps and fees nobody mentions, and how to work out which card pays you the most.
articles.trackingNotes: Live with cover photo. Rates need monthly recheck (Amex, Santander Edge change often).

earningPlan.route: Credit card affiliate (Awin / CJ UK finance programs)
earningPlan.detail: UK card issuers and comparison sites (TopCashback, Quidco, ClearScore) run affiliate programs via Awin and CJ. Payout per approved card application can be £20 to £60. Need: site with 10+ articles and traffic before applying, otherwise rejection likely.
Both have open refer-a-friend programs, no approval barrier. Natural fit inside this article as a bonus section: earn cashback on top of card cashback. Can add now.
Finance content has high ad rates (RPM often £10-25 UK). Apply after 20+ articles and some organic traffic, otherwise low earnings and risk of rejection.
Free PDF: card eligibility self-check list. Builds list for future affiliate promotions. Needs newsletter tool setup first.

articles.title: Side Hustle Tax Rules in the UK: When HMRC Needs to Know
articles.metaTitle: Side Hustle Tax Rules UK 2026: When HMRC Needs to Know
articles.metaDescription: Earning extra money in the UK? Here is exactly when you owe tax on a side hustle, what the £1,000 allowance covers, and what Vinted and eBay now tell HMRC.
articles.trackingNotes: Live. Needs cover photo (next improvement pass). £3,000 threshold law status recheck monthly.

earningPlan.route: Accounting software affiliate (FreeAgent, QuickBooks UK, Coconut)
earningPlan.detail: UK bookkeeping tools for side hustlers pay per signup or trial. Natural fit: article already tells readers to keep records. FreeAgent and QuickBooks run programs via affiliate networks.
Self Assessment filing services pay per referred customer. Fits the register-by-5-October section perfectly.
Same as site-wide plan: after 20+ articles.
Free simple income/expense tracker download for email signup. Cheap to make, high perceived value for this audience.
